telegram.notes: Inline keyboards attached to sent messages, introduced alongside callback queries and the message-edit methods. Verify the exact Bot API version against Telegram's official changelog before treating this as authoritative.

whatsapp.notes: WhatsApp Cloud API interactive messages support reply buttons (max 3) and list messages (max 10 rows) — a narrower, more constrained affordance than Telegram's arbitrary inline_keyboard grid, not a like-for-like equivalent.

chatwright-ts.notes: Telegram only (TelegramCodec: inline_keyboard parsed into journal actions, callback_query round-trip) — landed 2026-07-23. The WhatsApp codec (also landed 2026-07-23) is deliberately text-only and does not implement this capability; see docs/runtime-parity.md.
